_meta.author: Claude (national autopilot — federal-tier validation)
_meta.note: VA US House — federal tier. Ben Cline (R, VA-06): Heritage Action 98% lifetime, NRLC 100%, NRA A+, Club for Growth 94%. Documented conservative votes across life/marriage/family/economic/election/border/2A/industry; foreign-policy left null (mixed — opposed Ukraine aid but backed Israel/Taiwan aid, no clean restraint signal).

profile.religion: Catholic — St. Patrick's Catholic Church, Lexington VA
profile.background: U.S. House, VA-06, since 2019. Attorney, former Assistant Commonwealth's Attorney + VA Delegate. House Freedom Caucus; RSC Budget & Spending Task Force chair; Appropriations/Budget/Judiciary/Intel.

ben-cline.notes_set: U.S. Rep., VA-06 (R), since 2019. [2026-06 national refinement, federal tier] Heritage Action 98% lifetime; NRLC 100%; NRA A+; Club for Growth 94%. Documented: pro-life (Born-Alive, Pain-Capable cosponsor); NAY on Respect for Marriage Act + NO on Equality Act; Parents Bill of Rights + parental-rights amendment; CBDC Anti-Surveillance Act YES + RSC budget chair; SAVE Act YES + NO on HR1; HR2 Secure the Border YES; NAY on the Assault Weapons Ban + Bipartisan Safer Communities Act; voted to repeal the military COVID vaccine mandate. Jan 6, 2021 objected to certification. Foreign policy is MIXED (opposed the $95B Ukraine package but backed Israel/Taiwan aid) — left null, no clean restraint signal.

0.note: NRLC 100%; cosponsored Born-Alive + Pain-Capable (15-week) bills; affirms life from conception.

1.note: Consistently votes the maximal available pro-life position (Born-Alive, 15-week ban, defund PP); NRLC 100%.

0.note: Voted NAY on the Respect for Marriage Act; affirms man-woman marriage.

1.note: NAY on RFMA + NO on the Equality Act.

2.note: NO on the Equality Act (which codified gender-identity protections).

4.note: Opposed federal promotion of LGBTQ identity via the Equality Act.

0.note: Voted for the Parents Bill of Rights Act; supports school choice.

1.note: Cosponsored a constitutional parental-rights amendment (H.J.Res.127); Parents Bill of Rights.

2.note: Parents Bill of Rights — curriculum transparency / parents' right to know what's taught.

0.note: Voted YES on the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act (bars a Fed CBDC).

2.note: RSC Budget & Spending Task Force chair (authored the 'Fiscal Sanity' budget); Club for Growth 94%.

1.note: Voted YES on the SAVE Act (proof-of-citizenship to register).

3.note: Voted NO on HR1 / For the People Act (opposed mass mail-in expansion).

0.note: Voted YES on H.R.2 Secure the Border Act (border barrier + enforcement).

2.note: Sponsored anti-sanctuary-city legislation; opposes sanctuary policies.

1.note: NRA A+/100%; NAY on the Assault Weapons Ban (H.R.1808) and the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act.

0.note: Voted to repeal the military COVID vaccine mandate; opposes pharma mandates / supports informed consent.
